elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon character stands in a cluttered room filled with boxes, old furniture, and random items like a broken lamp and a stack of books. The character holds a dusty item tightly. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist cartoon scene. A smiling, simple-style cartoon character stands in a cluttered room. The room is filled with boxes, old furniture, a broken lamp, and a stack of books. The character is tightly holding a dusty, unspecified item. The scene has a conflicted and hesitant mood. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, pure white background. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: The same cartoon character looks conflicted, holding a cracked vase while surrounded by unnecessary items like outdated electronics and unused kitchenware. The background is pure white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist cartoon icon. The same simple-style cartoon character looks emotionally conflicted, holding a cracked vase. The character is surrounded by unnecessary clutter including outdated electronics and unused kitchenware. A tone of caution and preparedness. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, pure white background. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
